meaning: adj.蛋白石状的n.乳白玻璃,乳白色
examples: The opaline silver dial is very pure and classic.
One particular location where the opaline silicates were found was the large canyon system Valles Marineris.
These opaline silicates were detected by MRO's Compact Reconnaissance Imaging Spectrometer for Mars and are the youngest of the three types of hydrated minerals.
Re:Awakenings by Bill Morrison was commissioned by New York Live Arts as part of Live Ideas: The Worlds of Oliver Sacks and made possible by The Opaline Fund.
